instructions: This is a Poseidon2 hash function autoresearch project. Focus on correctness of cryptographic implementations, performance optimization, and reproducibility of experiments. Be direct and technical.

rules.rule: Do not use .unwrap() in non-test code. Use proper error handling with Result/Option types.
All unsafe blocks must have a safety comment explaining why they are necessary and correct.
Verify that any changes to hash function parameters, round constants, or MDS matrices are mathematically justified and reference the relevant paper or specification.
Benchmarks must document the environment, parameters, and methodology. Results should be reproducible.
All optimization experiments must produce reproducible traces. Accept/revert decisions must be logged with clear rationale.
